feed.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - update
feed.subtitle: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

entry.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
entry.content:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 1c5524b fix: remove orphaned circular-phase code from phase_analyzer; fix rejection warn
  • 63a7c8e fix: phase_analyzer computes mean PSD (dB) not circular phase; anova_analyzer ou
  • 77f2d9e feat: update ANOVA and correlation analyzers for improved functionality and outp
  • dbf8e5c feat: add phase analyzer and row filter processor modules
  • df35072 feat: enhance channel handling in ICA analysis and epoching processors

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

entry.title: Project Update: EmotiView
entry.content:
Recent activity in EmotiView:

Recent Commits

  • c84e7b2 Deploy: Sync public files from private repository CGutt-hub/EmotiViewPrivate@0ab

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

entry.title: Project Update: surveyWorkbench
entry.content:
Recent activity in surveyWorkbench:

Recent Commits

  • 1071529 Update survey workbench v2.0 binaries and warning log
  • fda7dc5 Derive target row from participant ID number (001->row2, 023->row24)
  • 0e23800 Fix case-insensitive sheet lookup; keep workbook open after extraction
  • 80fd4a1 Update binaries and fix warnings in survey_workbench_v2.0
  • 15606bd Remove _n stripping; update manual examples

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

entry.title: Website Update
entry.content:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 8106f62 feat: add table renderer for ANOVA stats output
  • 0360cf1 fix: render error bars for flat y_var arrays (EDA/HRV/FAI)
  • 4146223 fix: remove DE sub-pages and lang toggle from static tool pages
  • 446f275 fix: add GitRef to nav, rename Analysis Toolbox -> GitAtbx in base.html, remove
  • dd818b5 feat: add German versions of GitRef and GitAtbx tool pages

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
